author: cursor-maintainer

patch.value: Harden extension runtime failure containment by snapshotting override and renderer context payloads so failed handlers cannot leak mutations into fallback output.
M5 follow-up: isolate override and renderer contexts
Prevent extension command overrides and renderer overrides from mutating caller result objects during failure and fallback flows.

runCommandOverride and runRendererOverride use isolated context snapshots, docs describe the failure-containment contract, regression tests cover mutation leak prevention, and pm test plus test-all sweeps pass with 100 percent coverage.

value.author: cursor-maintainer
value.text: Why this exists: failed extension override and renderer handlers must not mutate fallback output state.

value.author: cursor-maintainer
value.text: Plan: docs first then loader runtime snapshot isolation then targeted tests and full regression sweeps.

value.author: cursor-maintainer
value.text: Hypothesis: cloning override and renderer context payloads closes remaining failure-containment leakage.

value.note: document extension override and renderer snapshot behavior
regression coverage for mutation leak prevention

message: Create Milestone 5 follow-up for override and renderer snapshot isolation | explicit_unset=assigned_to_session

value.author: cursor-maintainer
value.text: Planned change-set: docs-first update for override and renderer failure-containment snapshot semantics, then loader runtime clone hardening plus mutation-leak regression tests.

value.author: cursor-maintainer
value.text: Docs-first update completed: PRD and README now require isolated result snapshots for command overrides and renderer overrides so failed extension handlers cannot leak mutation into fallback output.

value.author: cursor-maintainer
value.text: Implemented: loader runtime now runs command handlers, command overrides, and renderer overrides against structured-cloned context snapshots so extension-side mutation cannot leak into caller fallback state; added regression tests that mutate nested data before async/throw paths and verified no leakage. Evidence: pm test pm-8d71 --run --timeout 1800 --json passed totals 2/2 linked tests. pm test-all --status in_progress --timeout 1800 --json passed totals items=1 linked_tests=2 passed=2 failed=0 skipped=0. pm test-all --status closed --timeout 1800 --json passed totals items=56 linked_tests=184 passed=56 failed=0 skipped=128. Coverage remains 100 percent for lines/branches/functions/statements.

author: cursor-maintainer
message: Close: override and renderer context snapshot isolation implemented, regression tests passed, and pm test plus test-all sweeps passed at 100 percent coverage.
